forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 1pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 62. West wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 42. West wind 5 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

weather_report:
This afternoon in Boston presents a delicate interplay between the remnants of a retreating chill and the soft embrace of tentative sunshine. A mere whisper of rain lingers in the afternoon air, with a slight chance of showers that may grace the city after one o’clock, but for now, the clouds hang above, beckoning the warmth of the day. The temperature is set to flirt with a comfortable sixty-two degrees, gently on the cusp of spring's promise, while a westward breeze carries hints of freshness, occasionally gusting to twenty-four miles per hour. It’s a day that invites you to don a light jacket—a comforting layer against the breeze, yet easy enough to shed when the sun warms your path.

As the twilight approaches, the sky will morph into a canvas of partly cloudy hues, gracefully transitioning into the quieter hours of the evening. The coolness of the night will settle around forty-two degrees, yet the charm of the city remains undiminished. With a touch of creativity, one might meander through the storied streets of Boston, perhaps lingering in a cozy café, savoring the rich aromas of coffee and conversation. Alternatively, a leisurely stroll along the esplanade could offer moments of reflection as the sun dips, painting the sky in soft pastels. It’s a day that nudges you gently outside, urging you to grasp at the subtle pleasures that lie in the ordinary.
